'''nathasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobcentre|jobcentre]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobcentre|jobcentre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nathasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næthæsæth|næthæsæth]] || [[word:næthæsæj|næthæsæj]] || [[word:næthæsæsh|næthæsæsh]] || [[word:næthæsæ|næthæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathathasath|nathathasath]] || [[word:nathathasaj|nathathasaj]] || [[word:nathathasash|nathathasash]] || [[word:nathathasa|nathathasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathasath|nathasath]] || [[word:nathasaj|nathasaj]] || [[word:nathasash|nathasash]] || [[word:nathasa|nathasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathafsath|nathafsath]] || [[word:nathafsaj|nathafsaj]] || [[word:nathafsash|nathafsash]] || [[word:nathafsaf|nathafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nathasatha|nathasatha]] || [[word:nathasaja|nathasaja]] || [[word:nathasasha|nathasasha]] || [[word:nathasaka|nathasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nathasath|nathasath]] || [[word:nathasaj|nathasaj]] || [[word:nathasash|nathasash]] || [[word:nathasa|nathasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nathasathal|nathasathal]] || [[word:nathasajal|nathasajal]] || [[word:nathasashal|nathasashal]] || [[word:nathasakal|nathasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nathasathatha|nathasathatha]] || [[word:nathasajaja|nathasajaja]] || [[word:nathasashasha|nathasashasha]] || [[word:nathasaka|nathasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nathasathan|nathasathan]] || [[word:nathasajan|nathasajan]] || [[word:nathasashan|nathasashan]] || [[word:nathasakan|nathasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nathasathaoro|nathasathaoro]] || [[word:nathasajaoro|nathasajaoro]] || [[word:nathasashaoro|nathasashaoro]] || [[word:nathasakaoro|nathasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
